rationale: The citing paper references Van Heerde, Gijsbrechts, and Pauwels (2015) only as one example of prior work that studied unprecedented marketing-policy changes ex post. It appears in grouped citations in the introduction and literature background, alongside other papers, to motivate the gap that this study addresses ex ante. The citing paper does not use this specific article's framework, measures, model, or findings in its own method development or empirical analysis.
